name: call_in_sample_data.json
content:
{
  "employees": [
    {
      "employee_id": "E12345",
      "first_name": "Susan",
      "last_name": "Jones",
      "location": "Store 101",
      "job_title": "Cashier",
      "status": "Active"
    },
    {
      "employee_id": "E67890",
      "first_name": "Susanne",
      "last_name": "Jones",
      "location": "Store 101",
      "job_title": "Cashier",
      "status": "Active"
    },
    {
      "employee_id": "E54321",
      "first_name": "Michael",
      "last_name": "Reed",
      "location": "Store 101",
      "job_title": "Shift Supervisor",
      "status": "Active"
    }
  ],
  "accrual_balances": [
    {
      "employee_id": "E12345",
      "accrual_type": "PTO",
      "balance_hours": 44.3
    },
    {
      "employee_id": "E12345",
      "accrual_type": "SICK",
      "balance_hours": 12
    },
    {
      "employee_id": "E67890",
      "accrual_type": "PTO",
      "balance_hours": 3.5
    }
  ],
  "shifts": [
    {
      "shift_id": "SFT1001",
      "date": "2026-02-03",
      "start_time": "09:00",
      "end_time": "15:00",
      "location": "Store 101",
      "position": "Cashier",
      "assigned_employee_id": "E12345",
      "status": "assigned"
    },
    {
      "shift_id": "SFT1002",
      "date": "2026-02-03",
      "start_time": "15:00",
      "end_time": "21:00",
      "location": "Store 101",
      "position": "Cashier",
      "assigned_employee_id": null,
      "status": "open"
    }
  ],
  "call_in_transaction_example": {
    "manager_id": "M11223",
    "timestamp": "2026-02-03T07:42:00-05:00",
    "employee_id": "E12345",
    "shift_id": "SFT1001",
    "absence_type": "PTO",
    "hours_applied": 6,
    "balance_before": 44.3,
    "balance_after": 38.3,
    "shift_status_before": "assigned",
    "shift_status_after": "open",
    "confirmation_text": "Manager confirmed marking Susan Jones as called in and opening shift."
  },
  "audit_log_example": [
    {
      "audit_id": "AUD90001",
      "action": "CALL_IN_PROCESSED",
      "manager_id": "M11223",
      "employee_id": "E12345",
      "shift_id": "SFT1001",
      "timestamp": "2026-02-03T07:43:12-05:00",
      "details": "Applied 6.0 hours PTO; shift converted to open."
    }
  ]
}
